title: Clean up copypaste.txt — raw OSC52 notes, should be moved to docs/ or deleted
Remove empty .cargo directory or add config
Fix focus mode rendering bug: terminal viewport misaligned after resize
close_reason: Fixed with ResizeObserver (active session only), scrollToBottom in toggleFocusMode, flexbox CSS for focus mode. Reviewer catch: scoped fit/sync to active session only to avoid zero-dimension resize on hidden background panes.

title: Audit and update AGENTS.md with missing files, correct CLI name (bd→br), stale rules
close_reason: AGENTS.md updated: bd→br CLI fix, key files expanded (6→14), comments rule softened, deps updated

title: Fix tauri.conf.json icon path mismatch
close_reason: False positive — all 17 icon paths in tauri.conf.json correctly resolve to src-tauri/icons/. Tauri resolves icon paths relative to src-tauri/ directory. No code change needed.

title: Remove dead greet command from lib.rs
Fix Linux webkit dep: 4.0 vs 4.1 mismatch in tauri.conf.json vs CI
close_reason: Fixed: updated tauri.conf.json deb depends from webkit2gtk-4.0-dev→4.1-dev and ayatana-indicator→indicator3-dev to match CI and Tauri 2.x requirements. Commit 6574d1a.
